category_sources: source_facts.description says bioinformatics workflow engine built on WDL; official overview describes a bioinformatics workflow execution engine.
display_name_sources: Official overview uses Sprocket for the project and notes sprocket for the command-line tool.
docs_sources: Official sprocket.bio documentation includes overview, concepts, and guides.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/stjude-rust-labs/sprocket, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions bioinformatics and WDL; official overview discusses workflow execution, WDL, HPC-scale workloads, and command-line tool.
